untranslatable_reason: This signal describes an options spread strategy (bear put spread) that requires multi-leg option position entry/exit logic, strike price selection, and expiration matching. Standard price-action indicators cannot encode: (1) buying higher strike put, (2) selling lower strike put, (3) same expiration synchronization, or (4) payoff profile based on strike differential. The backtest engine appears designed for single-leg price/indicator conditions, not complex derivatives strategies.
translation_notes: Signal requires options chain manipulation (strike selection, multi-leg coordination, expiration matching) beyond the scope of indicator-based rule engine. Recommend implementing via dedicated options strategy module or external derivatives execution framework.
